seoTitle: Sunshine Beach vs Surat — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sunshine Beach and Surat. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sunshine Beach vs Surat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sunshine Beach and Surat.
heading: Sunshine Beach vs Surat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sunshine Beach, Queensland and Surat, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Surat has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Sunshine Beach (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sunshine Beach or Surat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sunshine Beach has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Surat scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sunshine Beach scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Surat scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sunshine Beach or Surat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Surat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
